CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Larry Nelson Washingtons Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of 2400 Against Defendant And His Counsel Of Record Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Jason P. Williams In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jason P. Williams of Williams Palecek Law Group, LLP, Telephone (619)346-4263, appearing for Plaintiff Encompass Insurance Company (appearance via CourtCall);
Michael J. Smith of Carbone et al, Telpehone (510)267-7253, appearing for Defendant Larry Nelson Washington, et al;

The motion is heard and the Court makes the following ruling:

PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Defendant Larry Nelson Washingtons Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of 2400 Against Defendant And His Counsel Of Record.

Granted, verified responses due by Septmeber 20, 2018. Defendant's counsel will pay to plaintiff sanctions in the amount of $9,600.00 payable in three equal installments of $3,200.00 each, with the first installment due on September 20, 2018; the second installment due on October 22, 2018; and the third installment due on November 19, 2018.

Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Wohl is to prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
